description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of pink and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a gated entrance, a small garden with a tree, and a covered porch area with railings. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on both the ground and upper levels, providing ample natural light. The left side of the building has a driveway leading to a garage, while the right side features a greenhouse structure and additional landscaping. The rear of the bungalow is more enclosed, with fewer windows and a private balcony area. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed pink and white bungalow with a gated front garden, garage, porch, and greenhouse, featuring large windows and a compact, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, porch, garden, and main facade with large windows and garage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and extended garden area with greenhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more enclosed facade with a private balcony and minimal windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the greenhouse, side garden, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
